Business: Asian Granito India Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture and trade of tiles, marbles, and related products in India. It operates in two segments, Tiles & Other and Marble & Quartz. The company offers floor, wall, and parking tiles; glazed and polished vitrified tiles; countertops; quartz and marble surfaces; sanitary …
